channel.title: +Indians in Global Jihad on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Indians in Global Jihad on Vishvas's notes

item.title: 2021 Keralite in Kabul
item.description: Kerala man was among Kabul gurdwara attackers Vijaita Singh Mohsin left for UAE two years ago A man from Kasaragod in Kerala is said to be one of the three terrorists who stormed a gurdwara in Kabul on March 25 and killed around 25 Sikh worshippers, a senior government official told The Hindu. The official said at least three terrorists of the Islamic State in Khorasan Province (ISKP) had attacked the gurdwara.
